description_long: This is a small, fixed-wing airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are straight and extend laterally from the lower part of the fuselage, with visible ailerons and no winglets. The aircraft is equipped with two piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a two-blade propeller. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The exterior is painted in a blue-gray camouflage pattern, and the cockpit is enclosed with a large, dark-tinted canopy positioned near the front of the fuselage.
description: A small, low-wing, twin-propeller airplane with a blue-gray camouflage pattern and an enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin propellers, low-mounted straight wings, and the pointed nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wing-mounted engines, cockpit canopy, and the tail's horizontal and vertical stabilizers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, straight wings, and the back of the engines and propellers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the engine placement, cockpit, and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, dark-tinted canopy, likely single or dual seat.
